roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
DEFT'S REPLY TO DA'S OPPO TO MOT TO SUPPRESS FILED
DA OPP TO DFT 1538,5PC MOT FILED
PD 1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE FILED
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:2/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:05-20-08/ARBUCKLE/DISM3/VD:TRIAL DATE OF 05-30-08/NB/

/X:KEASARA WILLIAMS CERTIFIED LAW STUDENT UNDER THE SUPERVISON OF VICTOR HWANG APPEARS ON BEHALF OF THE PEOPLE/X:KARINA LLEVAS CERTIFIED LAW STUDENTUNDER THE SUPERVISON OF MATTHEW ROSEN APPEARS ON BEHALF OF THE DEFENDANT/TEXT:DEFT IS ORDERED HELD TO ANSWER/HOLDING/WIT SWORN:SFPD OFFICER JESSE FARRELL; SFPD OFFICER DAVE JOHNSON/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1 - MANILLA EVIDENCE ENVELOPE; PEOPLE'S 1A - PLASTIC BAGGIE CONTAINING WHITE POWDERY SUBSTANCE; PEOPLE'S 1C - NARCOTICS ANLAYSIS REPORT; PEOPLE'S 2 - CERTIFIED COPY OF DMV RECORD/CTORD:EXHIBITS ARE RETURNED TO SUBMITTING PARTY/CAL: PC 1538,5 MOTIONTO SUPPRESS/ARG&SUB/MO DENIED/TEXT/HTA1:1 & 2/X:MISDEMEANOR IS CERTIFIED/BAIL:10,000/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/TEXT/HTAHEARFIND/
